executiveSummary: The implementation for iteration 000020 (textgen and ModelManager.load_llm) fully satisfies the PRD. All six functional requirements and all three user stories are met: comfy_diffusion.textgen implements generate_text and generate_ltx2_prompt with the required signatures and lazy imports; ModelManager.load_llm resolves absolute/relative paths, registers models_dir/llm in folder_paths, and raises FileNotFoundError when the file is missing; __init__.py does not re-export textgen symbols; tests in tests/test_textgen.py and tests/test_model_manager_llm_loading.py pass on CPU with mocks. Ruff and mypy pass on the touched modules.
minorObservations: test_model_manager_llm_loading.py uses monkeypatch to inject fake folder_paths and comfy.sd; no real LLM weights are required — consistent with CPU-only CI.

test_ltx2_templates_match_comfyui_verbatim parses vendor/ComfyUI/comfy_extras/nodes_textgen.py via AST and asserts string equality of LTX2_T2V_SYSTEM_PROMPT and LTX2_I2V_SYSTEM_PROMPT, ensuring templates stay in sync with ComfyUI.
conclusionsAndRecommendations: All PRD requirements for iteration 000020 are satisfied. No gaps or non-compliance were found. Recommendation: close the iteration as complete; no refactor plan is required unless the team wishes to apply optional polish (e.g. additional docstring examples or a brief note in PROJECT_CONTEXT about the textgen/LLM feature).
